description_long: This is a rounded, footed plant pot with a single, thick handle arching over one side. The pot has a wide, open mouth and a deep, bowl-like body, making it suitable for holding soil and a small plant. Its surface is matte and slightly rough, with a subtle, uneven texture that suggests it is made from unglazed ceramic or clay. The color is a pale, natural beige with some slight variations and shading, giving it an earthy appearance. The base is a short, circular pedestal that elevates the pot slightly above the ground. There are no visible decorative patterns except for a faint, wavy line encircling the upper body.
description: A pale, rounded ceramic plant pot with a single handle and a short pedestal base, featuring a matte, slightly rough surface.
description_view_0: Front view showing the handle arching over the rim and the wide, open mouth of the pot.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness of the handle and the depth of the bowl, with the pedestal base visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the handle from behind and the subtle wavy line pattern near the rim.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the open mouth and the absence of a handle on this side, with the pedestal base clearly visible.
attribute_placement_context: commonly placed on garden tables or patios for decorative planting
